## Opportunity Details

**Company:**
<!-- e.g. Apple -->

**Role Title:**
<!-- e.g. Product Manager Intern -->

**Track:**
<!-- Select one: Product Management / APM Program / Program Management / Product Operations / Product-Adjacent/Other / New Grad -->

**Location:**
<!-- e.g. Cupertino, CA or Remote (US) -->

**Recruiting Season:**
<!-- Fall 2026 / Spring 2027 / Summer 2027 / New Grad -->

**Application Deadline (if any):**
<!-- e.g. July 31, 2026 -->

**Application Status:**
<!-- 🟢 Open / 🟡 Opening Soon / ⚪ Not Yet Open / 🔴 Closed -->

**Application Link:**
<!-- Paste the official application URL. If unavailable, write "not available yet" — do not guess or invent a link. -->

**Source (optional):**
<!-- Where did you find this? e.g. company careers page, LinkedIn, referral -->

---

### Checklist

- [ ] I confirmed this opportunity is not already listed in the repository
- [ ] The link goes to an official company page (not a third-party aggregator)
- [ ] I used the correct emoji status from the legend in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
